userRequest: Design an AI fitness app for busy professionals who want personalized workout and nutrition guidance.

product.content:
# Product Requirements Document

## User Segment
Busy professionals aged 25-45 seeking convenient and personalized wellness support.

## Core Features
- AI workout planner
- Nutrition recommendations
- Progress dashboard
- Reminder notifications

## Success Criteria
- 30-day retention above 35%
- Weekly active usage above 3 sessions per user

## Acceptance Criteria
- Users can generate a weekly fitness plan in under 30 seconds
- Users can track workouts and nutrition in a single dashboard
- Notifications can be configured by time and frequency

engineering.content:
# Technical Architecture

## Architecture
A web and mobile platform backed by a modular API service with AI orchestration.

## Components
- Mobile client and web dashboard
- Backend API for workout planner, nutrition recommendations, and notifications
- PostgreSQL for user and progress data
- LLM integration service for plan generation

## Data Flow and API
Client requests personalized plans through REST APIs. The API layer stores workout history and nutrition preferences, invokes the LLM integration service, and returns generated guidance to the dashboard.

## Technical Risks and Constraints
- LLM response quality must be monitored
- Notification delivery depends on third-party providers
- Cost control is required for model API usage and cloud hosting

finance.content:
# Commercial and Financial Report

## Target Market
Busy professionals in urban markets who value premium digital wellness services.

## Cost Structure
- Cloud hosting for backend API and database
- Model API usage for AI workout planner and nutrition recommendations
- Notification service costs
- Marketing acquisition spend

## Revenue Assumptions
- Freemium plan with premium subscription upsell
- Average premium subscription price of $14.99 per month
- 5% conversion from free to premium users by month 6

## ROI and Break-even
The product is expected to break even within 18 months if customer acquisition cost remains below $40 and subscription retention meets the product targets.
